1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, numeric. Answer with the category name only.'

    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
